overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing the protagonist walking through a rainy urban night environment. The character traverses wet sidewalks, passes a police cruiser and phone booth, crosses a street intersection, and navigates around various vehicles including taxis and sports cars under streetlight illumination.

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk at night, passing urban street furniture

red brick building with blue boarded-up storefront windows

row of leafy trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing a green bus shelter and an illuminated phone booth. A yellow taxi drives past on the right as the character approaches an intersection in the rain.

events.description: LCPD police SUV parked on the right shoulder with lights flashing
blue sedan drives past on the street followed by other vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past white construction barriers and the parked police vehicle

white A-frame construction barriers with orange warning lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks past construction barriers on the left and an LCPD police SUV parked on the right. Various vehicles including a blue sedan drive past on the wet street as the character continues along the sidewalk.

events.description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear before proceeding
stepping off the curb and beginning to cross the wet street

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-slicked asphalt street at the intersection, navigating between vehicles

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet black asphalt
overhead traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
large classical stone building with columns across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a wide urban intersection, waiting briefly before crossing the street. A classical stone building becomes visible across the intersection while a black SUV waits at the red light.

events.description: red sports car drives past closely on the right side of the character

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the classical stone building with columns

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection past the character

entered.detail: green subway entrance kiosk with signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks toward a prominent classical stone building with columns on the left. A red sports car passes closely on the right as the character continues through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban night, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk walk to the crossing of a wide city intersection. It begins with the character passing a green bus shelter and an illuminated phone booth as a yellow taxi drives by through the rain. As the character continues forward, the scene shifts past construction barriers and a parked LCPD police SUV while various vehicles glide across the wet pavement. The camera then follows the character into a wide intersection, where a black SUV waits at a red light before the path opens up toward a classical stone building. Finally, the movement concludes as the character passes the building's columns while a red sports car streaks past on the right.
